prompt: Implement portable unaligned little- and big-endian 16/32-bit loads and stores in utility.c using the API in utility.h. Do not cast byte pointers to wider integer pointers and do not depend on host byte order or alignment.
instruction: Implement portable unaligned little- and big-endian 16/32-bit loads and stores in utility.c using the API in utility.h. Do not cast byte pointers to wider integer pointers and do not depend on host byte order or alignment.
